# 2026-03-23 — Monday

Slept poorly. Two coffees before noon — regret.

Pushed the fix. Ran pytest twice to be sure.

Theo sent designs for the Before/After panel. They're right; my layout was overcomplicated.

Refactored numpy. Feels lighter now, not necessarily faster.

Priya pushed the tokenizers bump. Broke one test. Fixed it without regret — the test was wrong.

Hiked Alfama on Saturday. Wind hard enough to lean into.

Walked to Serra da Estrela after lunch. Got a coffee at Fábrica. Thought about nothing.
